description: Quantify per-position conservation anchored on reactive Glu and plot PqqA core motif conservation
code:
import re, numpy as np, matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from collections import Counter
data = {
"Acinetobacter calcoaceticus":"MQWTKPAFTDLRIGFEVTMYFEAR","P.protegens":"MTWSKPAYTDLRIGFEVTMYFASR",
"Kluyvera intermedia":"MWKKPAFIDLRLGLEVTLYISNR","S.stutzeri":"MWTKPSYTDLRIGFEVTLYFANR",
"K.pneumoniae":"MWKKPAFIDLRLGLEVTLYISNR","M.flagellatus":"MMWTKPEVTEMRFGFEVTMYVCNR",
"P.entomophila":"MWTKPAYTDLRIGFEVTMYFANR","Bradyrhizobium":"MAWKAPKIVEVPCGMEINMYVSATRK",
"Ruegeria pomeroyi":"MAWTAPKLREVNCGMEINMYAPAEDEGGRGTDPIL","Gluconobacter":"MAWNTPKVTEIPLGAEINSYVCGEKK",
"A.baylyi":"MWTKPAFEDIRLGFEITMYAAVE","P.aeruginosa":"MWTKPSFTDLRLGFEVTLYFANR",
"Variovorax":"MKWETPTATDLRFGFEITMYVSAR","P.fluorescens":"MAWTKPAYTDLRIGFEVTMYFASR",
"Colwellia":"MWTKPKFEEMRLGFEVTLYISNR","M.capsulatus":"MRWEKPSYNDMRFGFEVTMYIYNR",
"Dinoroseobacter":"MAWTKPIIREIECGMEINMYGPDSDEEREVLF","R.meliloti":"MAWHKPKFIEVSCAMEITRYAPADGDEPILF",
"Cereibacter":"MAWKTPRYDETPVGMEINMYACAKRK","M.radiotolerans":"MKWAAPIVSEICVGMEVTSYESAEIDTFN",
"Cupriavidus":"MTWTTPAYTELRLGFEITMYIANR","Burkholderia":"MQWTTPSYTDLRFGFEITMYIANR",
"G.diazotrophicus":"MAWTAPKITEVPLGAEINSYVCGQKK","M.extorquens":"MKWAAPIVSEICVGMEVTSYESAEIDTFN",
"P.putida (Q88QV4)":"MWTKPAYTDLRIGFEVTMYFANR",
}
# Anchor each seq on the reactive Glu of the C-terminal ExxxY motif, take window -2..+6
window=[]
for s in data.values():
    hits=[m.start() for m in re.finditer(r"E.{3}Y", s)]
    e=hits[-1]
    seg=s[e-2:e+7]
    if len(seg)==9: window.append(seg)
window=np.array([list(w) for w in window])
pos_labels=["-2","-1","E(0)","+1","+2","+3","Y(+4)","+5","+6"]
cons=[Counter(window[:,i]).most_common(1)[0] for i in range(9)]
print("Aligned on reactive Glu (E0); Tyr at +4:")
for i,(aa,ct) in enumerate(cons):
    print(f"  pos {pos_labels[i]:6s}: most common = {aa} ({100*ct/len(window):.0f}%)")

fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(8,3))
consvals=[ct/len(window) for aa,ct in cons]
colors=['#4477AA' if l in('E(0)','Y(+4)') else '#BBBBBB' for l in pos_labels]
ax.bar(pos_labels,consvals,color=colors)
ax.set_ylabel("Fractional conservation\n(most common residue)")
ax.set_title(f"PqqA reactive core conservation (n={len(window)} orthologs)\nGlu(0) & Tyr(+4) = cross-linked residues (100% conserved)")
ax.set_ylim(0,1.05)
for i,v in enumerate(consvals):
    ax.text(i,v+0.02,cons[i][0],ha='center',fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig("pqqA_motif_conservation.png",dpi=120)
print("saved")
print("Glu(0) conserved:",100*sum(window[:,2]=='E')/len(window),"%  Tyr(+4) conserved:",100*sum(window[:,6]=='Y')/len(window),"%")
